title: Plug Power Inc (PLUG) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Margin Growth and Strategic Advances
text: Plug Power reported Q3 2024 revenue of $173.7 million, representing an inflection in electrolyzer deployments, continued expansion of its internally produced hydrogen network, and increased leverage on its manufacturing footprint. Gross Margin Loss decreased 37% quarter-over-quarter, driven by multiple revenue streams with equipment improving 42%, service improving 776%, Power Purchase Agreements improving 13%, and fuel improving 9%. Net Loss: Plug recorded an EPS loss of $0.25 for Q3 2024, compared to $0.36 for Q2 2024. Operating Cash Flows improved 31% Quarter-Over-Quarter reflecting improvement in margins, working capital efficiency, and leverage of existing inventory. Plug reported an inflection point for revenue in Q3 2024 with electrolyzer sales increasing 285% quarter-over-quarter with contribution from 5MW system sales being recognized and additional revenue recognized from a large-scale order being deployed. Q4 2024 expected to see significant deployments continue.
